name: ruby-mime-types
title: ruby-mime-types
description:
guess MIME type of files
This library allows for the identification of a file's likely MIME
content type. The identification of MIME content type is based on a
file's filename extensions.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-mime-types because guess MIME type of files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-mime-types as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-mime-types with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-mime-types --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
